name: IdsWClmDelLoad

text.value: WITH cte AS (SELECT SRC_SYS_CD_SK, CLM_ID, SRC_SYS_CD FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_edw_staging}.A1_TMP_IdsWClmDelLoad) UPDATE T SET T.SRC_SYS_CD = cte.SRC_SYS_CD FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.W_CLM_DEL T JOIN cte ON T.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = cte.SRC_SYS_CD_SK AND T.CLM_ID = cte.CLM_ID;INSERT INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.W_CLM_DEL(SRC_SYS_CD_SK, CLM_ID, SRC_SYS_CD) SELECT cte.SRC_SYS_CD_SK, cte.CLM_ID, cte.SRC_SYS_CD FROM cte LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.W_CLM_DEL T ON T.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = cte.SRC_SYS_CD_SK AND T.CLM_ID = cte.CLM_ID WHERE T.SRC_SYS_CD_SK IS NULL;DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_edw_staging}.A1_TMP_IdsWClmDelLoad
